case_title: HELEN WANG VS. ROBERT KARL HANSON

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS FILED BY WANG, HELEN HANSON, ROBERT KARL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.00 FILED BY WANG, HELEN AS TO DEFENDANT HANSON, ROBERT KARL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-23-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-23-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT HANSON, ROBERT KARL DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS FOR 831240 & 831241 RETAINED IN SAME ENVELOPE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, HELEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANSON, ROBERT KARL $550.00 PRINCIPAL, $64.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $614.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF WANG, HELEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED OCT-08-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HANSON, ROBERT KARL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-23-2009 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HANSON, ROBERT KARL
